creator: malte.lance@gmx.net
text:
[Open|Mesa]Gl-version of xeyes to be added to /usr/ports/misc
Please use the tarball gleyes2.tar.gz. I have also uploaded a
tarball "gleyes.tar.gz" but it includes a buggy Makefile, so
please be so kind and delete it from the incoming-directory and
DO NOT use it.
Again: Use gleyes2.tar.gz in the incoming directory as the port-
tarball.
Sorry for the inconvenience.
